tool.name: smoothxg
tool.description: POA-aware graph smoother for pangenome graphs
tool.command: ln -sf '$gfa_in' input.gfa && smoothxg --gfa-in input.gfa --smoothed-out '$smoothed_out' --threads "\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1}" --n-haps $n_haps --block-id-min $block_id_min --path-jump-max $path_jump_max --edge-jump-max $edge_jump_max --poa-length-targets '$poa_length_targets' --poa-params '$poa_params' #if str($block_ratio_min).strip() --block-ratio-min $block_ratio_min #end if #if str($chop_to).strip() --chop-to $chop_to #end if $abpoa $change_alignment_mode $adaptive_poa_params

param.label: Number of haplotypes (-r)
param.help: Set to match the number of haplotypes in the source FASTA.

param.label: Min block identity (-I)
param.help: Minimum edit-based identity to cluster sequences into a block. pggb default 0.9.

param.label: Max path jump (-j)
param.help: Maximum path jump to include in a block.

param.label: Max edge jump (-e)
param.help: Maximum edge jump before breaking. 0 disables.

param.label: POA target lengths (-l)
param.help: Comma-separated POA target lengths; one smoothxg iteration is executed per length. pggb default is 700,900,1100.

param.label: POA score parameters (-p)
param.help: match,mismatch,gap1,ext1(,gap2,ext2). 4 values = affine, 6 = convex. pggb default 1,19,39,3,81,1.

param.label: Min block ratio (-R, blank = off)
param.help: Minimum small/large length ratio in a block.

param.label: Chop to length (-X, blank = default 100)
param.help: During prep, chop nodes to this length.

param.label: Adaptive POA parameters
param.help: Estimate POA scores from pairwise similarity in each block.

tool.help:
**smoothxg** — POA-aware graph smoother for pangenome graphs.
After `seqwish` induces a graph from PAF alignments, smoothxg finds collinear blocks and runs partial-order alignment (POA) within each block to smooth out small-scale alignment artifacts. The result is a cleaner GFA that downstream tools (`gfaffix`, `odgi`, `vg`) handle better.
This is the POA step in `pggb`.
-----
**Inputs**
- `Input graph` — seqwish-style GFA1. - `Number of haplotypes` — must match the source data.
**Key parameters**
- `--block-id-min` — minimum identity to cluster into a block (pggb default 0.9). - `--poa-length-targets` — comma-separated; one smoothxg iteration per length. pggb default `700,900,1100` (iterates 3 times). - `--poa-params` — score model. Default `1,19,39,3,81,1` (affine + linear gap).
**Output**
- Smoothed GFA1. Pass to `gfaffix` to collapse shared affixes, then to `odgi build` for the binary graph.
